      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

/* =======================================
   NEW YEAR MODAL
======================================= */
function NewYearModal({pal,family,onStart,onDismiss}){
  const today = new Date();
  // Default new year: starts today, ends ~10 months from now
  const defStart = today.toISOString().slice(0,10);
  const defEnd = new Date(today.getFullYear()+1, today.getMonth()-1, today.getDate()).toISOString().slice(0,10);

  const [yearStart, setYearStart] = useState(defStart);
  const [yearEnd,   setYearEnd]   = useState(defEnd);
  const [children,  setChildren]  = useState(
    family.children.map(c=>({...c, newGrade: nextGrade(c.grade)||c.grade}))
  );
  const [subjects,  setSubjects]  = useState(family.subjects||[]);
  const [notes,     setNotes]     = useState({}); // {childId: noteText}
  const [step,      setStep]      = useState(0); // 0=intro 1=dates 2=grades 3=notes 4=subjects

  const allSubjs = [...SUBJECT_OPTIONS,...(family.customSubjects||[])];
  const toggleSubj = id => setSubjects(s=>s.includes(id)?s.filter(x=>x!==id):[...s,id]);
  const updGrade = (id, grade) => setChildren(cs=>cs.map(c=>c.id===id?{...c,newGrade:grade}:c));
  const updNote  = (id, val)   => setNotes(n=>({...n,[id]:val}));

  const handleStart = () => {
    onStart({
      yearStart,
      yearEnd,
      subjects,
      children: children.map(c=>({...c, grade:c.newGrade, newYearNote:notes[c.id]||""})),
    });
  };

  return (
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(15,10,4,0.82)",backdropFilter:"blur(14px)",zIndex:400,display:"flex",alignItems:"flex-end",justifyContent:"center"}}>
      <div style={{background:pal.linen,borderRadius:"28px 28px 0 0",width:"100%",maxWidth:"430px",maxHeight:"92vh",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",animation:"slideUp 0.3s ease"}}>

        {/* Handle */}
        <div style={{padding:"0.7rem 0 0",display:"flex",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{width:"36px",height:"4px",borderRadius:"99px",background:pal.stone}}/>
        </div>

        {/* Header */}
        <div style={{background:pal.heroGrad,padding:"1rem 1.2rem",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{fontWeight:"900",color:"#fff",fontSize:"1.05rem",marginBottom:"2px"}}>{"🌱 New School Year!"}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:"0.74rem",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.75)"}}>
            {"Your " + new Date(family.yearEnd).getFullYear() + " school year has ended. Let" + String.fromCharCode(39) + "s set up the next one."}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Step dots */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"5px",padding:"0.7rem 1.2rem 0",flexShrink:0}}>
          {["Dates","Grades","Notes","Subjects"].map((l,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{flex:1,textAlign:"center"}}>
              <div style={{height:"4px",borderRadius:"99px",background:i<=step-1?pal.primary:pal.stone+"35",marginBottom:"3px",transition:"background 0.25s"}}/>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.58rem",color:i<=step-1?pal.primary:pal.stone,fontWeight:i===step-1?"700":"400"}}>{l}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        <div key={step} style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"1rem 1.2rem"}}>

          {/* Step 0: Intro */}
          {step===0&&(
            <div style={{animation:"fadeUp 0.2s ease"}}>
              <div style={{textAlign:"center",marginBottom:"1.5rem",paddingTop:"0.5rem"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:"3.5rem",marginBottom:"0.6rem"}}>🎉</div>
                <div style={{fontWeight:"900",color:pal.ink,fontSize:"1.1rem",marginBottom:"0.4rem"}}>Year Complete!</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:"0.82rem",color:pal.slate,lineHeight:1.65,maxWidth:"280px",margin:"0 auto"}}>
                  {"Your attendance counter will reset to zero and your new year will start fresh. Your portfolio and all past entries are saved."}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style={{background:pal.pale,borderRadius:"14px",padding:"0.9rem 1rem",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.primary}20`,marginBottom:"1rem"}}>
                <div style={{fontWeight:"700",color:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.82rem",marginBottom:"0.5rem"}}>{"What resets:"}</div>
                {[
                  ["📅","Attendance counter → back to 0"],
                  ["🔥","Daily streak → resets"],
                  ["📋","Schedule stays the same"],
                  ["🗂","Portfolio entries are kept"],
                ].map(([icon,label])=>(
                  <div key={label} style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.5rem",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"0.3rem"}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:"0.9rem",flexShrink:0}}>{icon}</span>
                    <span style={{fontSize:"0.78rem",color:pal.inkM}}>{label}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Step 1: Dates */}
          {step===1&&(
            <div style={{animation:"fadeUp 0.2s ease"}}>
              <div style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.82rem",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.06em",marginBottom:"0.65rem"}}>New Year Dates</div>
              <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:"0.65rem",marginBottom:"1rem"}}>
                <div>
                  <Lbl pal={pal}>Start date</Lbl>
                  <input type="date" value={yearStart} onChange={e=>setYearStart(e.target.value)}
                    style={{width:"100%",padding:"0.55rem 0.7rem",border:`2px solid ${pal.stone}`,borderRadius:"10px",fontSize:"0.82rem",background:pal.parchm,color:pal.ink,outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit"}}
                    onFocus={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=pal.primary} onBlur={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=pal.stone}/>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <Lbl pal={pal}>Goal end date</Lbl>
                  <input type="date" value={yearEnd} onChange={e=>setYearEnd(e.target.value)}
                    style={{width:"100%",padding:"0.55rem 0.7rem",border:`2px solid ${pal.stone}`,borderRadius:"10px",fontSize:"0.82rem",background:pal.parchm,color:pal.ink,outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit"}}
                    onFocus={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=pal.primary} onBlur={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=pal.stone}/>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style={{background:pal.linen,borderRadius:"12px",padding:"0.7rem 0.9rem",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.stone}30`,fontSize:"0.74rem",color:pal.slate,lineHeight:1.6}}>
                {"You can always adjust these later in Settings \u2192 Family."}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Step 2: Grade promotion */}
          {step===2&&(
            <div style={{animation:"fadeUp 0.2s ease"}}>
              <div style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.82rem",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.06em",marginBottom:"0.2rem"}}>Confirm Grades</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.74rem",color:pal.slate,marginBottom:"0.85rem",lineHeight:1.55}}>
                {"We" + String.fromCharCode(39) + "ve suggested the next grade for each child. Change any that don" + String.fromCharCode(39) + "t look right."}
              </div>
              {children.map(c=>{
                const cp = CHILD_COLOR_PALETTES.find(p=>p.id===(c.colorId||"sunshine"))||CHILD_COLOR_PALETTES[0];
                const pcTier = c.newGrade&&["Pre-K","K","1st","2nd"].includes(c.newGrade)?"Playful & low-pressure"
                  :["3rd","4th","5th","6th","7th","8th"].includes(c.newGrade)?"Story-based & scenario-driven"
                  :"Matter-of-fact & responsibility-focused";
                return (
                  <div key={c.id} style={{background:pal.linen,borderRadius:"16px",padding:"0.9rem 1rem",marginBottom:"0.75rem",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.stone}30`}}>
                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.75rem",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"0.75rem"}}>
                      <div style={{width:"42px",height:"42px",borderRadius:"11px",background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${cp.c1},${cp.c2})`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"1.4rem",flexShrink:0}}>{c.avatar}</div>
                      <div style={{flex:1}}>
                        <div style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.ink,fontSize:"0.9rem"}}>{c.name}</div>
                        <div style={{fontSize:"0.7rem",color:pal.slate,marginTop:"1px"}}>
                          {c.grade} {"\u2192"} <span style={{fontWeight:"700",color:cp.c1}}>{c.newGrade}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <select value={c.newGrade} onChange={e=>updGrade(c.id,e.target.value)}
                        style={{padding:"0.42rem 0.65rem",border:`2px solid ${cp.c1}`,borderRadius:"10px",fontSize:"0.84rem",background:pal.pale,color:cp.c1,fontWeight:"700",outline:"none",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                        {GRADES.map(g=><option key={g} value={g}>{g}</option>)}
                      </select>
                    </div>
                    {family.lifeReady&&(
                      <div style={{background:`${LR_COLOR}10`,borderRadius:"9px",padding:"0.45rem 0.65rem",border:`1px solid ${LR_COLOR}25`,display:"flex",gap:"0.4rem",alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
                        <span style={{fontSize:"0.85rem",flexShrink:0}}>{LR_ICON}</span>
                        <div style={{fontSize:"0.69rem",color:LR_COLOR,lineHeight:1.5}}>
                          <b>P{"&"}C updates automatically</b>{" \u2014 "}{c.newGrade} lessons will use the <b>{pcTier}</b> style.
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Step 3: New year notes per child */}
          {step===3&&(
            <div style={{animation:"fadeUp 0.2s ease"}}>
              <div style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.82rem",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.06em",marginBottom:"0.2rem"}}>Teaching Notes</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.74rem",color:pal.slate,marginBottom:"0.85rem",lineHeight:1.55}}>
                Optional — jot down anything to keep in mind going into the new year. What to focus on, what struggled, goals, or anything you want to remember on day one.
              </div>
              {children.map(c=>{
                const cp = CHILD_COLOR_PALETTES.find(p=>p.id===(c.colorId||"sunshine"))||CHILD_COLOR_PALETTES[0];
                return (
                  <div key={c.id} style={{marginBottom:"1rem"}}>
                    {family.children.length>1&&(
                      <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"0.5rem",marginBottom:"0.4rem"}}>
                        <div style={{width:"28px",height:"28px",borderRadius:"7px",background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${cp.c1},${cp.c2})`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"0.95rem",flexShrink:0}}>{c.avatar}</div>
                        <span style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.ink,fontSize:"0.86rem"}}>{c.name}</span>
                        <span style={{fontSize:"0.7rem",color:pal.slate}}>{c.newGrade}</span>
                      </div>
                    )}
                    <textarea
                      value={notes[c.id]||""}
                      onChange={e=>updNote(c.id,e.target.value)}
                      placeholder={"e.g. " + c.name + " needs more practice with reading fluency. Really excelled at math this year \u2014 ready for harder problems. Consider adding more hands-on science. Keep an eye on writing stamina."}
                      rows={4}
                      style={{width:"100%",padding:"0.7rem 0.85rem",border:`2px solid ${pal.stone}`,borderRadius:"12px",fontSize:"0.81rem",fontFamily:"inherit",background:pal.parchm,color:pal.ink,resize:"none",outline:"none",lineHeight:1.6}}
                      onFocus={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=cp.c1}
                      onBlur={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=pal.stone}/>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
              <div style={{background:pal.pale,borderRadius:"11px",padding:"0.65rem 0.85rem",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.primary}20`,fontSize:"0.71rem",color:pal.slate,lineHeight:1.55}}>
                {"These notes are saved to each child" + String.fromCharCode(39) + "s profile and will show in their portfolio as a new year note."}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Step 4: Subjects */}
          {step===4&&(
            <div style={{animation:"fadeUp 0.2s ease"}}>
              <div style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.82rem",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.06em",marginBottom:"0.2rem"}}>Subjects This Year</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.74rem",color:pal.slate,marginBottom:"0.85rem"}}>Review and update for the new year. Add or remove anything that changed.</div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:"0.35rem"}}>
                {allSubjs.map(s=>{
                  const sel=subjects.includes(s.id);
                  return (
                    <button key={s.id} onClick={()=>toggleSubj(s.id)}
                      style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.65rem",alignItems:"center",padding:"0.6rem 0.85rem",border:`2px solid ${sel?pal.primary:pal.stone+"50"}`,borderRadius:"11px",background:sel?pal.pale:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"left",transition:"all 0.13s"}}>
                      <span style={{fontSize:"1rem",width:"22px",textAlign:"center",flexShrink:0}}>{s.icon||"📋"}</span>
                      <span style={{flex:1,fontWeight:sel?"700":"400",color:sel?pal.primary:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.83rem"}}>{s.label}</span>
                      <div style={{width:"18px",height:"18px",borderRadius:"4px",border:`2px solid ${sel?pal.primary:pal.stone}`,background:sel?pal.primary:"transparent",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
                        {sel&&<span style={{color:"#fff",fontSize:"0.72rem",fontWeight:"900"}}>{"✓"}</span>}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

        </div>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div style={{padding:"0.9rem 1.2rem",borderTop:`1px solid ${pal.stone}40`,background:pal.linen,flexShrink:0,display:"flex",gap:"0.55rem"}}>
          {step===0 ? (
            <button onClick={onDismiss}
              style={{padding:"0.7rem 1rem",border:`2px solid ${pal.stone}`,borderRadius:"12px",background:"transparent",color:pal.slate,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"0.82rem"}}>
              Later
            </button>
          ) : (
            <button onClick={()=>setStep(s=>s-1)}
              style={{padding:"0.7rem 1rem",border:`2px solid ${pal.stone}`,borderRadius:"12px",background:"transparent",color:pal.slate,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"0.82rem"}}>
              Back
            </button>
          )}
          <button onClick={()=>{
            if(step<4) setStep(s=>s+1);
            else handleStart();
          }} style={{flex:1,padding:"0.7rem",border:"none",borderRadius:"12px",background:pal.accentGrad,color:"#fff",fontWeight:"800",fontSize:"0.88rem",cursor:"pointer"}}>
            {step===0?"Set up new year \u2192":step===4?"Start new year \uD83C\uDF31":"Next \u2192"}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
/* =======================================
   GOALS NUDGE CARD
======================================= */
const GOAL_NUDGES = {
  faith:       {nudge:"Start with devotion or Bible time today.",              subjs:["Bible / Faith"],                      tab:"schedule",  icon:"✞"},
  reading:     {nudge:"Did you log reading today? Titles count for FL.",       subjs:["Reading","Reading/Language Arts"],    tab:"portfolio", icon:"📖"},
  college:     {nudge:"Keep those records sharp — log today's work.",          subjs:[],                                     tab:"portfolio", icon:"🎓"},
  critical:    {nudge:"Ask one open-ended question at the end of school.",     subjs:[],                                     tab:"schedule",  icon:"🧠"},
  worldview:   {nudge:"Weave worldview into today — history or current events.", subjs:["History"],                         tab:"schedule",  icon:"🌍"},
  life:        {nudge:"Any life skills to practice or log this week?",         subjs:["Life Skills"],                        tab:"portfolio", icon:"🏠"},
  independence:{nudge:"Let them lead something today — even something small.", subjs:[],                                     tab:"schedule",  icon:"🦅"},
  social:      {nudge:"Co-op, community, or group activities this week?",      subjs:["Co-op"],                              tab:"coop",      icon:"🤝"},
  service:     {nudge:"Any service or giving opportunities this week?",        subjs:[],                                     tab:"more",      icon:"🤎"},
  entrepreneur:{nudge:"Talk money, business, or a project idea today.",        subjs:[],                                     tab:"schedule",  icon:"💼"},
  nature:      {nudge:"A nature walk or observation counts as school!",        subjs:["Nature Study"],                       tab:"portfolio", icon:"🌿"},
  sports:      {nudge:"Movement and PE count — log it in portfolio.",          subjs:["PE / Movement"],                      tab:"portfolio", icon:"🏃"},
  travel:      {nudge:"Explore a map, culture, or geography today.",           subjs:["Geography"],                          tab:"schedule",  icon:"🗺"},
  homestead:   {nudge:"Garden, animals, or home project time today?",          subjs:[],                                     tab:"portfolio", icon:"🌻"},
};

/* =======================================
   OBSERVATION JOURNAL MODAL
   Private per-child parent notes.
   Quick capture, timestamped, never
   shown in portfolio or reports.
======================================= */
function ObservationJournalModal({pal, family, childId, entries, onAdd, onDelete, onClose}){
  const child = family.children.find(c=>c.id===childId)||family.children[0];
  const ci    = family.children.findIndex(c=>c.id===childId);
  const cp    = CHILD_COLOR_PALETTES.find(p=>p.id===(child?.colorId||"sunshine"))||CHILD_COLOR_PALETTES[0];

  const [text,     setText]     = useState("");
  const [delConf,  setDelConf]  = useState(null); // id to confirm delete
  const inputRef = useRef(null);

  const childEntries = entries.filter(e=>e.childId===childId)
    .sort((a,b)=>b.ts-(a.ts||0));

  const handleAdd = () => {
    const t = text.trim();
    if(!t) return;
    const now = new Date();
    onAdd({
      id: uid(),
      childId,
      text: t,
      ts: now.getTime(),
      date: now.toLocaleDateString("en-US",{weekday:"short",month:"short",day:"numeric"}),
      time: now.toLocaleTimeString("en-US",{hour:"numeric",minute:"2-digit"}),
    });
    setText("");
    inputRef.current?.focus();
  };

  const PROMPTS = [
    "Had a breakthrough with...",
    "Struggled today with...",
    "Asked a great question about...",
    "Really excited about...",
    "I noticed...",
    "Something to follow up on...",
  ];

  return (
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(10,15,10,0.8)",backdropFilter:"blur(14px)",zIndex:250,display:"flex",alignItems:"flex-end",justifyContent:"center"}}>
      <div style={{background:pal.linen,borderRadius:"28px 28px 0 0",width:"100%",maxWidth:"430px",maxHeight:"90vh",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",boxShadow:"0 -16px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)",animation:"slideUp 0.28s ease"}}>

        {/* Handle */}
        <div style={{padding:"0.7rem 0 0",display:"flex",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{width:"36px",height:"4px",borderRadius:"99px",background:pal.stone}}/>
        </div>

        {/* Header */}
        <div style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${cp.c1},${cp.c2})`,padding:"0.9rem 1.2rem",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"0.65rem"}}>
              <div style={{width:"40px",height:"40px",borderRadius:"11px",background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.22)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"1.3rem"}}>
                {child?.avatar||"🌱"}
              </div>
              <div>
                <div style={{fontWeight:"900",color:"#fff",fontSize:"0.95rem"}}>{child?.name}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:"0.68rem",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.72)"}}>
                  {"📓 Parent observations · "+childEntries.length+" note"+(childEntries.length!==1?"s":"")}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <button onClick={onClose}
              style={{width:"28px",height:"28px",borderRadius:"50%",background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.2)",border:"none",color:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"0.85rem",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
              {"✕"}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Quick-add input */}
        <div style={{padding:"0.85rem 1.1rem 0.7rem",borderBottom:`1px solid ${pal.stone}30`,flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.5rem",alignItems:"flex-end"}}>
            <textarea
              ref={inputRef}
              value={text}
              onChange={e=>setText(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={e=>{ if(e.key==="Enter"&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();handleAdd();} }}
              placeholder={"Quick note about "+child?.name+"... (Enter to save)"}
              rows={2}
              style={{flex:1,resize:"none",padding:"0.6rem 0.8rem",border:`2px solid ${cp.c1}50`,borderRadius:"12px",background:pal.parchm,fontSize:"0.83rem",fontFamily:"inherit",color:pal.ink,outline:"none",lineHeight:1.5}}
              autoFocus
            />
            <button onClick={handleAdd} disabled={!text.trim()}
              style={{width:"42px",height:"42px",borderRadius:"12px",border:"none",background:text.trim()?`linear-gradient(135deg,${cp.c1},${cp.c2})`:"#ccc",color:"#fff",cursor:text.trim()?"pointer":"default",fontSize:"1.1rem",flexShrink:0,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
              {"✓"}
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Prompt chips */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.3rem",flexWrap:"wrap",marginTop:"0.5rem"}}>
            {PROMPTS.map(p=>(
              <button key={p} onClick={()=>{setText(p);setTimeout(()=>inputRef.current?.focus(),50);}}
                style={{padding:"0.18rem 0.6rem",border:`1px solid ${cp.c1}40`,borderRadius:"20px",background:"transparent",color:cp.c1,fontSize:"0.68rem",cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:"500"}}>
                {p}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>

          <div style={{fontSize:"0.63rem",color:pal.stone,marginTop:"0.4rem"}}>
            {"🔒 Private — never shown in portfolio or reports"}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Entries list */}
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"0.75rem 1.1rem"}}>
          {childEntries.length===0?(
            <div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"2rem 1rem"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:"2.5rem",marginBottom:"0.5rem"}}>📓</div>
              <div style={{fontWeight:"700",color:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.88rem",marginBottom:"0.3rem"}}>No notes yet</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.75rem",color:pal.slate,lineHeight:1.6}}>
                {"Capture moments, breakthroughs, and observations about "+child?.name+". Just for you."}
              </div>
            </div>
          ):(
            <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:"0.6rem"}}>
              {childEntries.map(entry=>(
                <div key={entry.id} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:"14px",padding:"0.75rem 0.9rem",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.stone}20`,position:"relative"}}>
                  {/* Date/time badge */}
                  <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"0.4rem"}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:"0.63rem",color:pal.stone,fontWeight:"600"}}>
                      {entry.date}{entry.time?" · "+entry.time:""}
                    </span>
                    {delConf===entry.id?(
                      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.3rem"}}>
                        <button onClick={()=>setDelConf(null)}
                          style={{padding:"0.12rem 0.5rem",border:`1px solid ${pal.stone}`,borderRadius:"8px",background:"transparent",color:pal.slate,fontSize:"0.65rem",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                          Keep
                        </button>
                        <button onClick={()=>{onDelete(entry.id);setDelConf(null);}}
                          style={{padding:"0.12rem 0.5rem",border:"none",borderRadius:"8px",background:"#e53e3e",color:"#fff",fontSize:"0.65rem",cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:"700"}}>
                          Delete
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    ):(
                      <button onClick={()=>setDelConf(entry.id)}
                        style={{width:"20px",height:"20px",borderRadius:"50%",border:`1px solid ${pal.stone}30`,background:"transparent",color:pal.stone,fontSize:"0.58rem",cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
                        {"✕"}
                      </button>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  {/* Note text */}
                  <div style={{fontSize:"0.83rem",color:pal.ink,lineHeight:1.6,whiteSpace:"pre-wrap"}}>
                    {entry.text}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
          <div style={{height:"0.5rem"}}/>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

const DISMISS_KEY = "rootbloom_goals_nudge_dismiss";

function GoalsNudgeCard({pal,family,portfolioEntries,todayStr,onTabChange}){
  const goals = family.goals||[];
  if(goals.length===0) return null;

  // Check if dismissed today
  const [dismissed, setDismissed] = useState(()=>{
    try{ return localStorage.getItem(DISMISS_KEY)===todayStr; }catch(e){return false;}
  });
  const dismiss = () => {
    try{ localStorage.setItem(DISMISS_KEY, todayStr); }catch(e){}
    setDismissed(true);
  };
  if(dismissed) return null;

  // Find the most actionable goal — prefer one whose subject hasn't been logged today
  const todayEntries = portfolioEntries.filter(e=>
    e.date===new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric"})
  );
  const loggedSubjsToday = new Set(todayEntries.map(e=>e.subj));

  // Score each goal: +2 if subject not yet logged today, +1 otherwise
  const allGoalObjs = [...GOALS,...(family.customGoals||[])];
  const scored = goals.map(id=>{
    const g = allGoalObjs.find(x=>x.id===id);
    const nudge = GOAL_NUDGES[id];
    if(!g||!nudge) return null;
    const subjectLogged = nudge.subjs.length>0 && nudge.subjs.some(s=>loggedSubjsToday.has(s));
    return {id, g, nudge, subjectLogged, score: subjectLogged?0:2};
  }).filter(Boolean).sort((a,b)=>b.score-a.score);

  if(scored.length===0) return null;

  const primary = scored[0]; // most actionable goal
  const completed = primary.subjectLogged;

  // Show top 3 goal icons
  const topGoals = scored.slice(0,3);

  return (
    <div style={{background:pal.linen,borderRadius:"16px",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.primary}25`,marginBottom:"1rem",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {/* Header row */}
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",padding:"0.7rem 0.9rem 0.55rem"}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"0.5rem"}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:"0.62rem",fontWeight:"800",color:pal.primary,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.1em"}}>
            Working Toward
          </span>
        </div>
        <button onClick={dismiss}
          style={{width:"22px",height:"22px",borderRadius:"50%",background:pal.parchm,border:"none",color:pal.stone,fontSize:"0.7rem",cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontWeight:"700",flexShrink:0}}>
          {"✕"}
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Goal pills */}
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.35rem",padding:"0 0.9rem 0.65rem",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
        {topGoals.map(({id,g,subjectLogged})=>{
          const nudge = GOAL_NUDGES[id];
          return (
            <button key={id} onClick={()=>onTabChange("goals")}
              style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"0.3rem",padding:"0.22rem 0.6rem",background:subjectLogged?pal.goodBg:`${pal.primary}12`,borderRadius:"20px",border:`1.5px solid ${subjectLogged?pal.good+"50":pal.primary+"30"}`,cursor:"pointer"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:"0.85rem"}}>{nudge?.icon||g.icon}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:"0.7rem",fontWeight:"700",color:subjectLogged?pal.good:pal.primary}}>{g.label}</span>
              {subjectLogged&&<span style={{fontSize:"0.65rem",color:pal.good,fontWeight:"900"}}>{"✓"}</span>}
            </button>
          );
        })}
        {goals.length>3&&(
          <button onClick={()=>onTabChange("goals")}
            style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",padding:"0.22rem 0.55rem",background:pal.parchm,borderRadius:"20px",border:"none",cursor:"pointer"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:"0.68rem",color:pal.slate,fontWeight:"600"}}>+{goals.length-3} more</span>
          </button>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Nudge message */}
      <div style={{borderTop:`1px solid ${pal.stone}20`,padding:"0.6rem 0.9rem",background:completed?"transparent":pal.pale,display:"flex",gap:"0.6rem",alignItems:"center"}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:"1rem",flexShrink:0}}>{completed?"🌟":primary.nudge?.icon||"💡"}</span>
        <div style={{flex:1}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:"0.77rem",color:completed?pal.good:pal.inkM,fontWeight:"600",lineHeight:1.5}}>
            {completed
              ? primary.g.label+" logged today — great work!"
              : primary.nudge.nudge}
          </div>
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>onTabChange("goals")}
          style={{padding:"0.28rem 0.7rem",border:"none",borderRadius:"9px",background:pal.accentGrad,color:"#fff",fontSize:"0.68rem",fontWeight:"800",cursor:"pointer",whiteSpace:"nowrap",flexShrink:0}}>
          {"View Goals"}
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function HomeScreen({ pal, family, child, setChild, onTheme, attendanceDays, checkinStreak, lastCheckinDate, portfolioEntries, onTabChange, todayProgress, onAddEntry, onCheckin, checkinDates={}, observationLog=[], onOpenJournal, attendanceLog=[], studentVisits={} }) {
  const stateInfo  = getStateInfo(family.state||"");
  const stateHours = stateInfo.hours||"";
  const dayMatch   = stateHours.match(/(\d+)\s*day/i);
  const REQUIRED   = dayMatch ? parseInt(dayMatch[1]) : (stateInfo.attendance ? 180 : null);
  const blocks = generateSchedule(family, family.scheduleMode2!=="same"?(child!=="all"?child:family.children?.[0]?.id):null);
  const [showQuickLog, setShowQuickLog] = useState(false);
  const [logQueue,     setLogQueue]     = useState([]); // children yet to be logged in sequence
  const [nextChildPrompt, setNextChildPrompt] = useState(null); // {nextChildId, prevEntries, queue}
  const [carryOverSubjs,  setCarryOverSubjs]  = useState([]);
  const todayStr = new Date().toDateString();

  // Start logging — build queue of children who haven't been logged today
  const startLog = () => {
    const todayDateStr = new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric"});
    if(child!=="all"||family.children.length===1){
      // Single child mode — log that child
      setLogQueue([]);
      setShowQuickLog(true);
    } else {
      // Multi-child — queue all children not yet logged today
      const unlogged = family.children.filter(c=>checkinDates[c.id]!==todayStr);
      if(unlogged.length===0){
        // All already logged — still allow adding more
        setLogQueue([]);
        setShowQuickLog(true);
      } else {
        setLogQueue(unlogged.slice(1).map(c=>c.id));
        setChild(unlogged[0].id);
        setShowQuickLog(true);
      }
    }
  };

  // P&C week completion state
  const PC_KEY = "rootbloom_pc_done";
  const getPCWeekKey = () => {
    const now = new Date();
    const yearStart = new Date(now.getFullYear(),7,1);
    const weekNum = Math.floor((now-yearStart)/(7*24*60*60*1000));
    return now.getFullYear()+"-"+weekNum;
  };
  const [pcDone, setPcDone] = useState(()=>{
    try{ const s=localStorage.getItem(PC_KEY); return s?JSON.parse(s).weekKey===getPCWeekKey():false; }catch(e){return false;}
  });
  const markPCDone = () => {
    try{ localStorage.setItem(PC_KEY,JSON.stringify({weekKey:getPCWeekKey(),date:new Date().toDateString()})); }catch(e){}
    setPcDone(true);
  };
  const visible = blocks.filter(b=>child==="all"||b.c==="all"||b.c===child);
  const pct = REQUIRED ? Math.min(100, Math.round((attendanceDays/REQUIRED)*100)) : null;
  const onTrack = (() => {
    if(!REQUIRED||!family.yearStart||!family.yearEnd) return pct!==null?(pct>=68):true;
    const start=new Date(family.yearStart), end=new Date(family.yearEnd), now=new Date();
    const totalDays=(end-start)/(24*60*60*1000);
    const elapsed=Math.max(0,(now-start)/(24*60*60*1000));
    const expectedPct=Math.min(100,Math.round((elapsed/totalDays)*100));
    return pct>=expectedPct-10;
  })();
  // checkedInToday: true if the currently viewed child (or any child in all mode) is logged today
  const checkedInToday = child!=="all"
    ? checkinDates[child]===todayStr
    : family.children.some(c=>checkinDates[c.id]===todayStr) || lastCheckinDate===todayStr;

  // Build subject progress from portfolio entries
  const customSubjs = family.customSubjects || [];
  const allSubjMap = Object.fromEntries([...SUBJECT_OPTIONS,...customSubjs].map(s=>[s.id,s]));
  const activeSubjects = (family.subjects||[]).slice(0,5).map(id=>allSubjMap[id]).filter(Boolean);
  const totalEntries = portfolioEntries.length || 1;
  const subjProgress = activeSubjects.map(s=>{
    const count = portfolioEntries.filter(e=>e.subj===s.label||e.subj===s.id).length;
    return {n:s.label, i:s.icon, p:Math.min(95,Math.round((count/Math.max(totalEntries*0.3,1))*100))};
  });

  // Hours estimate using daily goal or default 3hrs
  const dailyHrs = (() => {
    const g = family.dailyHoursGoal||"3 hours/day";
    if(g==="No hour tracking") return null;
    const m = g.match(/(\d+)/);
    return m ? parseInt(m[1]) : 3;
  })();
  const hoursEst = dailyHrs ? Math.round(attendanceDays * dailyHrs) : null;

  return (
    <div style={{animation:"fadeUp 0.24s ease"}}>
      {/* Hero header */}
      <div style={{background:pal.heroGrad,padding:"1.4rem 1.1rem 1.65rem",position:"relative",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",right:"-40px",top:"-40px",width:"160px",height:"160px",borderRadius:"50%",background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.055)"}}/>
        <div style={{position:"relative"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:"0.6rem",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.5)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.14em",fontWeight:"700",marginBottom:"0.18rem"}}>{today()}</div>
          <h1 style={{margin:"0 0 0.08rem",fontSize:"1.45rem",fontWeight:"800",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.95)",lineHeight:1.2}}>{greet()},</h1>
          <h1 style={{margin:"0 0 1.1rem",fontSize:"1.45rem",fontWeight:"800",lineHeight:1.2,background:pal.shimmer,backgroundSize:"200% auto",WebkitBackgroundClip:"text",WebkitTextFillColor:"transparent",animation:"shimmer 4s linear infinite"}}>
            {family.parentName||family.familyName} 🌱
          </h1>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.38rem",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            <Chip pal={pal} label="All" active={child==="all"} onClick={()=>setChild("all")} dark />
            {family.children.map(c=><Chip key={c.id} pal={pal} label={c.avatar+" "+c.name} active={child===c.id} onClick={()=>setChild(c.id)} dark />)}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style={{padding:"1rem"}}>
        <FirstVisitTip pal={pal} screen="home"/>

        {/* ── Multi-child dashboard — shown when "All" selected and 2+ children ── */}
        {child==="all" && family.children.length>1 && (()=>{
          const todayDateStr = new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric"});
          const weekStart = new Date();
          weekStart.setDate(weekStart.getDate() - (weekStart.getDay()===0?6:weekStart.getDay()-1));
          const weekDates = Array.from({length:5},(_,i)=>{
            const d=new Date(weekStart); d.setDate(weekStart.getDate()+i);
            return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric"});
          });

          return (
            <div style={{marginBottom:"1rem"}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"0.5rem"}}>
                <span style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.78rem",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.06em"}}>{"Today's Roster"}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:"0.68rem",color:pal.slate}}>{new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-US",{weekday:"long"})}</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:"0.42rem"}}>
                {family.children.map((c,ci)=>{
                  const cp = CHILD_COLOR_PALETTES.find(p=>p.id===(c.colorId||"sunshine"))||CHILD_COLOR_PALETTES[0];
                  const childEntries = portfolioEntries.filter(e=>e.childIdx===ci);
                  const loggedToday = checkinDates[c.id]===todayStr || childEntries.some(e=>e.date===todayDateStr&&!e.isDay);
                  const weekEntries = childEntries.filter(e=>weekDates.includes(e.date)&&!e.isDay).length;
                  const lastEntry = childEntries[0];

                  // Get child's subjects for mini progress dots
                  const childSubjs = family.scheduleMode2==="separate"||family.scheduleMode2==="mixed"
                    ? (c.scheduleConfig?.subjects||family.subjects||[])
                    : (family.subjects||[]);
                  const loggedSubjsToday = new Set(childEntries.filter(e=>e.date===todayDateStr&&!e.isDay).map(e=>e.subj));
                  const subjDone = childSubjs.filter(id=>{
                    const s=[...SUBJECT_OPTIONS,...(family.customSubjects||[])].find(x=>x.id===id);
                    return s&&loggedSubjsToday.has(s.label);
                  }).length;
                  const selfLoggedToday = childEntries.filter(e=>e.date===todayDateStr&&e.selfLogged);

                  return (
                    <button key={c.id} onClick={()=>setChild(c.id)}
                      style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.75rem",alignItems:"center",padding:"0.75rem 0.9rem",background:loggedToday?`linear-gradient(135deg,${cp.c1}18,${cp.c2}10)`:`${pal.linen}`,borderRadius:"14px",border:`2px solid ${loggedToday?cp.c1+"50":pal.stone+"30"}`,cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"left",transition:"all 0.15s",width:"100%"}}>

                      {/* Avatar */}
                      <div style={{width:"44px",height:"44px",borderRadius:"12px",background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${cp.c1},${cp.c2})`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"1.4rem",flexShrink:0,position:"relative"}}>
                        {c.avatar}
                        {loggedToday&&(
                          <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:"-3px",right:"-3px",width:"16px",height:"16px",borderRadius:"50%",background:pal.good,border:"2px solid #fff",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"0.5rem",color:"#fff",fontWeight:"900"}}>
                            {"✓"}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>

                      {/* Name + grade + last activity */}
                      <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"baseline",gap:"0.4rem",marginBottom:"2px"}}>
                          <span style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.ink,fontSize:"0.88rem"}}>{c.name}</span>
                          <span style={{fontSize:"0.65rem",color:pal.slate,fontWeight:"500"}}>{c.grade}</span>
                          {studentVisits[c.id]===todayStr&&(
                            <span style={{fontSize:"0.58rem",fontWeight:"700",color:pal.primary,background:pal.pale,padding:"0.1rem 0.4rem",borderRadius:"99px",border:`1px solid ${pal.primary}30`}}>{"📱 in portal"}</span>
                          )}
                        </div>
                        {loggedToday?(
                          <div style={{fontSize:"0.68rem",color:pal.good,fontWeight:"600"}}>
                            {"✓ Logged today"}
                            {childSubjs.length>0&&" · "+subjDone+"/"+childSubjs.length+" subjects"}
                            {selfLoggedToday.length>0&&(
                              <span style={{color:pal.primary,fontWeight:"700"}}>{" · "+selfLoggedToday.length+" by "+c.name}</span>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        ):(
                          <div style={{fontSize:"0.68rem",color:pal.slate}}>
                            {studentVisits[c.id]&&studentVisits[c.id]!==todayStr
                              ? "Portal: "+new Date(studentVisits[c.id]).toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric"})+" · "+(lastEntry?"logged "+lastEntry.date:"no entries")
                              : lastEntry
                                ? "Last logged: "+lastEntry.date
                                : "No entries yet"}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>

                      {/* Week entries badge + journal button + arrow */}
                      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"flex-end",gap:"4px",flexShrink:0}}>
                        <div style={{background:loggedToday?cp.c1:pal.parchm,borderRadius:"20px",padding:"0.18rem 0.55rem",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"0.25rem"}}>
                          <span style={{fontSize:"0.68rem",fontWeight:"800",color:loggedToday?"#fff":pal.slate}}>{weekEntries}</span>
                          <span style={{fontSize:"0.58rem",color:loggedToday?"rgba(255,255,255,0.8)":pal.stone,fontWeight:"600"}}>this wk</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.3rem",alignItems:"center"}}>
                          <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();onOpenJournal&&onOpenJournal(c.id);}}
                            style={{padding:"0.15rem 0.45rem",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.stone}40`,borderRadius:"8px",background:pal.parchm,color:pal.slate,fontSize:"0.65rem",cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:"600"}}>
                            {"📓"}
                          </button>
                          <span style={{fontSize:"0.72rem",color:pal.stone}}>{"›"}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        })()}

        {/* Stats row - filtered by selected child (or single-child families) */}
        {(child!=="all" || family.children.length===1) && (()=>{
          const ci = child==="all" ? 0 : family.children.findIndex(c=>c.id===child);
          const ch = family.children[ci];
          const cp = CHILD_COLOR_PALETTES.find(p=>p.id===(ch?.colorId||"sunshine"))||CHILD_COLOR_PALETTES[0];
          const childEntries = portfolioEntries.filter(e=>e.childIdx===ci);
          return (
            <div style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${cp.c1}22,${cp.c2}15)`,borderRadius:"16px",padding:"0.85rem 1rem",marginBottom:"1rem",border:`2px solid ${cp.c1}30`,display:"flex",gap:"0.75rem",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <div style={{width:"46px",height:"46px",borderRadius:"13px",background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${cp.c1},${cp.c2})`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"1.6rem",flexShrink:0}}>{ch?.avatar}</div>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.ink,fontSize:"0.92rem"}}>{ch?.name}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:"0.72rem",color:pal.slate}}>{ch?.grade} {"\u00b7"} {childEntries.length} portfolio {childEntries.length===1?"entry":"entries"}</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}>
                <div style={{fontWeight:"900",color:cp.c1,fontSize:"1.3rem",lineHeight:1}}>{childEntries.length}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:"0.58rem",color:pal.slate,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.06em"}}>entries</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        })()}
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(3,1fr)",gap:"0.55rem",marginBottom:"1rem"}}>
          {[
            {l:"Days",    v:attendanceDays,  c:pal.primary, bg:pal.pale},
            {l:"Hours",   v:hoursEst!==null?hoursEst+"h":"—", c:pal.mid, bg:pal.paleMid},
            REQUIRED
              ? {l:"On Track", v:pct+"%", c:onTrack?pal.good:pal.warn, bg:onTrack?pal.goodBg:pal.warnBg}
              : {l:"This Year", v:attendanceDays+" days", c:pal.good, bg:pal.goodBg},
          ].map(s=>(
            <div key={s.l} style={{background:s.bg,borderRadius:"15px",padding:"0.8rem 0.6rem",textAlign:"center",border:`1.5px solid ${s.c}22`}}>
              <div style={{fontWeight:"800",color:s.c,fontSize:"1.25rem",lineHeight:1}}>{s.v}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:"0.58rem",color:pal.slate,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.07em",marginTop:"3px"}}>{s.l}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Year progress bar — only show if state has day requirement */}
        {REQUIRED&&(
          <div style={{background:pal.linen,borderRadius:"14px",padding:"0.75rem 1rem",marginBottom:"1rem",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.stone}35`}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"6px"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:"0.74rem",fontWeight:"700",color:pal.inkM}}>School Year</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:"0.72rem",fontWeight:"800",color:onTrack?pal.good:pal.warn}}>{attendanceDays} / {REQUIRED} days</span>
            </div>
            <div style={{height:"8px",borderRadius:"99px",background:pal.parchm,overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div style={{height:"100%",width:`${pct}%`,borderRadius:"99px",background:onTrack?`linear-gradient(90deg,${pal.good},${pal.mid})`:pal.accentGrad,transition:"width 0.5s ease"}}/>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ── Smart Today Card — single unified action ── */}
        {(()=>{
          const prog = (todayProgress && todayProgress.date===todayStr) ? todayProgress : null;
          const schedDone = prog && prog.total>0 && prog.count>=prog.total;
          const inProgress = prog && prog.count>0 && !schedDone;

          if(schedDone || checkedInToday) {
            // State 3: All done for the day
            return (
              <div style={{background:pal.goodBg,borderRadius:"16px",padding:"0.95rem 1.1rem",marginBottom:"1rem",border:`2px solid ${pal.good}40`}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.85rem",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"0.65rem"}}>
                  <div style={{width:"46px",height:"46px",borderRadius:"13px",background:pal.good,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"1.5rem",flexShrink:0}}>{"🌟"}</div>
                  <div style={{flex:1}}>
                    <div style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.good,fontSize:"0.92rem"}}>{"Day logged!"}</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:"0.71rem",color:pal.inkM,marginTop:"2px"}}>
                      {checkinStreak>0 ? "🔥 "+checkinStreak+" day streak — amazing!" : "Great work today."}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.5rem"}}>
                  <button onClick={startLog}
                    style={{flex:1,padding:"0.48rem",border:`2px solid ${pal.good}50`,borderRadius:"10px",background:"transparent",color:pal.good,fontSize:"0.74rem",fontWeight:"700",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                    {"+ Add More"}
                  </button>
                  <button onClick={()=>onTabChange("schedule")}
                    style={{flex:1,padding:"0.48rem",border:`2px solid ${pal.good}50`,borderRadius:"10px",background:"transparent",color:pal.good,fontSize:"0.74rem",fontWeight:"700",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                    {"View Schedule"}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          }

          if(inProgress) {
            // State 2: In progress — show bar + subjects left
            const pct2 = Math.round(prog.count/prog.total*100);
            return (
              <div onClick={()=>onTabChange("schedule")}
                style={{background:pal.linen,borderRadius:"16px",padding:"0.95rem 1.1rem",marginBottom:"1rem",border:`2px solid ${pal.primary}30`,cursor:"pointer"}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"7px"}}>
                  <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"0.5rem"}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:"1.1rem"}}>{"📋"}</span>
                    <div style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.ink,fontSize:"0.88rem"}}>{"In progress"}</div>
                  </div>
                  <span style={{fontSize:"0.78rem",fontWeight:"900",color:pal.primary}}>{prog.count}/{prog.total}</span>
                </div>
                <div style={{height:"9px",borderRadius:"99px",background:pal.parchm,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:"6px"}}>
                  <div style={{height:"100%",width:`${pct2}%`,borderRadius:"99px",background:pal.accentGrad,transition:"width 0.4s"}}/>
                </div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:"0.7rem",color:pal.slate}}>
                    {prog.total-prog.count} subject{prog.total-prog.count!==1?"s":""} left
                    {checkinStreak>0?" · 🔥 "+checkinStreak+" day streak":""}
                  </div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:"0.7rem",fontWeight:"700",color:pal.primary}}>{"Continue →"}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          }

          // State 1: Haven't started yet
          return (
            <div style={{background:pal.accentGrad,borderRadius:"16px",padding:"1rem 1.1rem",marginBottom:"1rem",border:"none",boxShadow:`0 5px 20px ${pal.accent}30`}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"0.75rem",marginBottom:"0.75rem"}}>
                <div style={{width:"44px",height:"44px",borderRadius:"12px",background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.18)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"1.3rem",flexShrink:0}}>{"📋"}</div>
                <div style={{flex:1,textAlign:"left"}}>
                  <div style={{fontWeight:"800",color:"#fff",fontSize:"0.92rem",marginBottom:"2px"}}>{"Start today's school day"}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:"0.72rem",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.75)"}}>
                    {checkinStreak>0 ? "🔥 "+checkinStreak+" day streak — keep it going!" : "Log what you did or check off the schedule"}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.5rem"}}>
                <button onClick={startLog}
                  style={{flex:2,padding:"0.58rem",border:"none",borderRadius:"11px",background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.92)",color:pal.primary,fontWeight:"800",fontSize:"0.82rem",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                  {"📝 Log Today"}
                </button>
                <button onClick={()=>onTabChange("schedule")}
                  style={{flex:1,padding:"0.58rem",border:"2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4)",borderRadius:"11px",background:"transparent",color:"#fff",fontWeight:"700",fontSize:"0.78rem",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                  {"📅 Schedule"}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        })()}

        {/* ── Consistency Nudge ── */}
        {(()=>{
          if(checkedInToday) return null;
          const lastDate = lastCheckinDate ? new Date(lastCheckinDate) : null;
          if(!lastDate) return null;
          const daysSince = Math.floor((new Date() - lastDate) / (24*60*60*1000));
          if(daysSince < 2) return null;
          const msg = daysSince===2
            ? "Yesterday was a skip day — no worries! Ready to log today?"
            : daysSince<=4
              ? "It's been "+daysSince+" days — pick up where you left off 🌱"
              : "Welcome back! It’s been a while — even a quick log keeps the streak alive.";
          return (
            <div style={{background:"#fffbeb",borderRadius:"13px",padding:"0.7rem 1rem",marginBottom:"1rem",border:"1.5px solid #f5c842",display:"flex",gap:"0.65rem",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:"1.1rem",flexShrink:0}}>{"💛"}</span>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{fontWeight:"700",color:"#7a5500",fontSize:"0.79rem"}}>{msg}</div>
              </div>
              <button onClick={startLog}
                style={{padding:"0.3rem 0.7rem",border:"none",borderRadius:"9px",background:"#f5c842",color:"#5a3d00",fontWeight:"800",fontSize:"0.72rem",cursor:"pointer",flexShrink:0,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
                {"Log now"}
              </button>
            </div>
          );
        })()}

        {/* ── Missed Day Nudge ── */}
        {(()=>{
          if(!attendanceLog||attendanceLog.length===0) return null;
          const yr = new Date().getFullYear();
          const weekStart3 = new Date();
          weekStart3.setDate(weekStart3.getDate()-(weekStart3.getDay()===0?6:weekStart3.getDay()-1));
          weekStart3.setHours(0,0,0,0);
          const today3 = new Date(); today3.setHours(23,59,59,999);
          const loggedPortfolioDates = new Set(portfolioEntries.filter(e=>e.date).map(e=>e.date));
          // Find attendance days this week (school days only) with no portfolio entries
          const missedDays = attendanceLog.filter(e=>{
            if(!["School Day","Field Trip"].includes(e.type)) return false;
            try{
              const d=new Date(e.date+", "+yr);
              return d>=weekStart3 && d<today3 && !loggedPortfolioDates.has(e.date);
            }catch{return false;}
          }).map(e=>e.date);
          if(missedDays.length===0) return null;
          const label = missedDays.length===1
            ? missedDays[0]+" isn\u2019t logged yet"
            : missedDays.length+" days this week aren\u2019t logged yet";
          return (
            <div style={{background:"#fff8e6",borderRadius:"13px",padding:"0.7rem 1rem",marginBottom:"1rem",border:"1.5px solid #f5c842",display:"flex",gap:"0.65rem",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:"1.1rem",flexShrink:0}}>{"📅"}</span>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{fontWeight:"700",color:"#7a5500",fontSize:"0.79rem"}}>{label}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:"0.68rem",color:"#b07800",marginTop:"2px"}}>{"Go to Attendance to log the details."}</div>
              </div>
              <button onClick={()=>onTabChange("attendance")}
                style={{padding:"0.3rem 0.7rem",border:"none",borderRadius:"9px",background:"#f5c842",color:"#5a3d00",fontWeight:"800",fontSize:"0.72rem",cursor:"pointer",flexShrink:0,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
                {"Log it"}
              </button>
            </div>
          );
        })()}

        {/* ── Behind This Week Nudge ── */}
        {(()=>{
          const lessonGoals2 = family.lessonGoals||{};
          if(Object.keys(lessonGoals2).length===0) return null;
          const activeSubjIds2 = family.subjects||[];
          const customSubjs3   = family.customSubjects||[];
          const allSubjMap3    = Object.fromEntries([...SUBJECT_OPTIONS,...customSubjs3].map(s=>[s.id,s]));
          const yr3 = new Date().getFullYear();
          const weekStart4 = new Date();
          weekStart4.setDate(weekStart4.getDate()-(weekStart4.getDay()===0?6:weekStart4.getDay()-1));
          weekStart4.setHours(0,0,0,0);
          const todayDow2 = new Date().getDay(); // 0=Sun ... 6=Sat
          // Days elapsed this week Mon=0...today (capped at Fri=4)
          const daysElapsed = todayDow2===0 ? 0 : Math.min(todayDow2-1, 4); // Mon-based, 0=Mon
          const ci3 = child==="all" ? -1 : family.children.findIndex(c=>c.id===child);
          const weekEntries3 = (ci3>=0
            ? portfolioEntries.filter(e=>e.childIdx===ci3&&!e.isDay)
            : portfolioEntries.filter(e=>!e.isDay)
          ).filter(e=>{ try{ return new Date(e.date+", "+yr3)>=weekStart4; }catch{return false;} });
          const loggedPerSubj3 = {};
          weekEntries3.forEach(e=>{ if(e.subj) loggedPerSubj3[e.subj]=(loggedPerSubj3[e.subj]||0)+(e.lessonCount||1); });
          // Compute target through today (days 0..daysElapsed)
          const behindSubjs = activeSubjIds2.map(id=>allSubjMap3[id]).filter(Boolean).filter(s=>{
            const dayMap = lessonGoals2[s.id];
            if(!dayMap) return false;
            const targetSoFar = [0,1,2,3,4].slice(0,daysElapsed+1).reduce((sum,d)=>sum+(dayMap[d]||0),0);
            if(targetSoFar===0) return false;
            const logged = loggedPerSubj3[s.label]||0;
            return logged < targetSoFar;
          });
          if(behindSubjs.length===0) return null;
          const names = behindSubjs.map(s=>s.icon+" "+s.label).join(", ");
          return (
            <div style={{background:pal.pale,borderRadius:"13px",padding:"0.7rem 1rem",marginBottom:"1rem",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.primary}30`,display:"flex",gap:"0.65rem",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:"1.1rem",flexShrink:0}}>{"📚"}</span>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{fontWeight:"700",color:pal.primary,fontSize:"0.79rem"}}>
                  {behindSubjs.length===1 ? names+" is behind this week" : "A few subjects are behind this week"}
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:"0.68rem",color:pal.inkM,marginTop:"2px",lineHeight:1.4}}>
                  {behindSubjs.length>1 ? names : "Tap to log a lesson and catch up."}
                </div>
              </div>
              <button onClick={startLog}
                style={{padding:"0.3rem 0.7rem",border:"none",borderRadius:"9px",background:pal.primary,color:"#fff",fontWeight:"800",fontSize:"0.72rem",cursor:"pointer",flexShrink:0,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
                {"Log now"}
              </button>
            </div>
          );
        })()}

        {/* ── Goals Nudge Card ── */}
        <GoalsNudgeCard pal={pal} family={family} portfolioEntries={portfolioEntries} todayStr={todayStr} onTabChange={onTabChange}/>

        {/* Today schedule preview */}
        {(()=>{
          // Check if today is a co-op day or day-off per weeklySchedule
          const todayJs2 = new Date().getDay();
          const todayIdx2 = todayJs2===0||todayJs2===6 ? null : todayJs2-1;
          const ws2 = family.weeklySchedule;
          const todayDaySubjs = (ws2&&todayIdx2!==null) ? ws2[todayIdx2] : undefined;
          const isTodayCoop2 = family.coopDay && ["Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday"][todayIdx2??-1]===family.coopDay;
          const isTodayOff   = todayDaySubjs===null && !isTodayCoop2;
          if(isTodayOff) {
            return (
              <div style={{background:pal.parchm,borderRadius:"14px",padding:"0.85rem 1rem",marginBottom:"1rem",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.stone}30`,display:"flex",gap:"0.6rem",alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:"1.2rem"}}>{"🛋"}</span>
                <div>
                  <div style={{fontWeight:"700",color:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.84rem"}}>{"No school today"}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:"0.72rem",color:pal.slate,marginTop:"2px"}}>{"Rest day — nothing scheduled."}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          }
          if(isTodayCoop2) {
            const coopSubjsList = family.coopClasses||[];
            return (
              <div style={{background:"#fff8e6",borderRadius:"14px",padding:"0.85rem 1rem",marginBottom:"1rem",border:"1.5px solid #f5c84250"}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"0.45rem"}}>
                  <span style={{fontWeight:"800",color:"#7a5500",fontSize:"0.82rem",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.06em"}}>{"Co-op Day 🏫"}</span>
                  <button onClick={()=>onTabChange("schedule")} style={{fontSize:"0.72rem",color:"#b07800",fontWeight:"700",background:"transparent",border:"none",cursor:"pointer"}}>{"Schedule →"}</button>
                </div>
                {coopSubjsList.length>0 ? (
                  <div style={{display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:"0.3rem"}}>
                    {coopSubjsList.slice(0,6).map(s=>(
                      <span key={s} style={{padding:"0.22rem 0.6rem",background:"rgba(245,200,66,0.15)",borderRadius:"20px",fontSize:"0.74rem",fontWeight:"700",color:"#7a5500",border:"1px solid #f5c84240"}}>{s}</span>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div style={{fontSize:"0.74rem",color:"#b07800"}}>{"Co-op classes set up in Settings → School."}</div>
                )}
              </div>
            );
          }
          return null;
        })()}
        {visible.length > 0 && (<>
          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"0.5rem"}}>
            <span style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.82rem",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.06em"}}>{"Today's Plan"}</span>
            <button onClick={()=>onTabChange("schedule")} style={{fontSize:"0.72rem",color:pal.primary,fontWeight:"700",background:"transparent",border:"none",cursor:"pointer"}}>See all →</button>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:"0.42rem",marginBottom:"1rem"}}>
            {visible.slice(0,4).map((b,i)=>(
              <div key={i} onClick={()=>onTabChange("schedule")} style={{background:pal.linen,borderRadius:"13px",padding:"0.65rem 0.85rem",display:"flex",gap:"0.75rem",alignItems:"center",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.stone}45`,cursor:"pointer"}}>
                <div style={{width:"36px",height:"36px",borderRadius:"9px",background:`${pal.primary}18`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"1.1rem",flexShrink:0}}>{b.i}</div>
                <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                  <div style={{fontWeight:"700",color:pal.ink,fontSize:"0.84rem",whiteSpace:"nowrap",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis"}}>{b.s}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:"0.7rem",color:pal.slate}}>{b.t?h12(b.t)+" · ":""}{b.dur} min</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
            {visible.length > 4 && <div style={{textAlign:"center",fontSize:"0.72rem",color:pal.slate,fontStyle:"italic"}}>+{visible.length-4} more blocks</div>}
          </div>
        </>)}

        {/* ── This Week: lesson progress ── */}
        {(()=>{
          const lessonGoals  = family.lessonGoals||{};
          const hasGoals     = Object.keys(lessonGoals).length>0;
          const activeSubjIds= family.subjects||[];
          const customSubjs2 = family.customSubjects||[];
          const allSubjMap2  = Object.fromEntries([...SUBJECT_OPTIONS,...customSubjs2].map(s=>[s.id,s]));
          const activeSubjList2 = activeSubjIds.map(id=>allSubjMap2[id]).filter(Boolean);
          if(activeSubjList2.length===0) return null;
          if(portfolioEntries.length===0) return null;

          // Week boundaries
          const weekStart2 = new Date();
          weekStart2.setDate(weekStart2.getDate()-(weekStart2.getDay()===0?6:weekStart2.getDay()-1));
          weekStart2.setHours(0,0,0,0);
          const yr2 = new Date().getFullYear();
          const todayDow = new Date().getDay(); // 0=Sun,1=Mon...6=Sat

          // Filter entries by active child
          const ci2 = child==="all" ? -1 : family.children.findIndex(c=>c.id===child);
          const relevantEntries = (ci2>=0
            ? portfolioEntries.filter(e=>e.childIdx===ci2&&!e.isDay)
            : portfolioEntries.filter(e=>!e.isDay)
          ).filter(e=>{ try{ return new Date(e.date+", "+yr2)>=weekStart2; }catch{ return false; } });

          // Compute weekly target per subject from lessonGoals {subjId: {dow: count}}
          // dow 0=Mon ... 4=Fri in our system
          const getWeeklyTarget = (subjId) => {
            if(!hasGoals||!lessonGoals[subjId]) return null;
            const dayMap = lessonGoals[subjId];
            // Only count days that have already passed this week (Mon=1...today)
            // For "target by end of week" sum all 5 days
            return [0,1,2,3,4].reduce((sum,d)=>sum+(dayMap[d]||0),0);
          };

          // Compute lessons logged per subject this week
          const loggedPerSubj = {};
          relevantEntries.forEach(e=>{
            if(!e.subj) return;
            loggedPerSubj[e.subj] = (loggedPerSubj[e.subj]||0) + (e.lessonCount||1);
          });

          // Build subject cards
          const cards = activeSubjList2.map(s=>{
            const logged = loggedPerSubj[s.label]||0;
            const target = getWeeklyTarget(s.id);
            const touched = logged>0;
            const onTrack = target===null ? touched : logged>=target;
            const pct     = target ? Math.min(100,Math.round(logged/target*100)) : (touched?100:0);
            return {s, logged, target, touched, onTrack, pct};
          });

          const allOnTrack = cards.every(c=>c.onTrack);
          const hasAnyData = cards.some(c=>c.touched);

          return (
            <>
              <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"0.5rem"}}>
                <span style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.82rem",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.06em"}}>
                  {"This Week"}
                </span>
                <button onClick={()=>onTabChange("portfolio")} style={{fontSize:"0.72rem",color:pal.primary,fontWeight:"700",background:"transparent",border:"none",cursor:"pointer"}}>Portfolio {"→"}</button>
              </div>
              <div style={{background:pal.linen,borderRadius:"16px",padding:"0.9rem 1rem",border:`1.5px solid ${allOnTrack&&hasAnyData?pal.good+"50":pal.stone+"45"}`,marginBottom:"1rem"}}>
                {allOnTrack&&hasAnyData?(
                  <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.65rem",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"0.75rem"}}>
                    <div style={{width:"38px",height:"38px",borderRadius:"10px",background:pal.goodBg,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"1.2rem",flexShrink:0}}>{"🌟"}</div>
                    <div>
                      <div style={{fontWeight:"700",color:pal.good,fontSize:"0.85rem"}}>
                        {hasGoals?"All lesson goals hit this week!":"All subjects covered this week!"}
                      </div>
                      <div style={{fontSize:"0.7rem",color:pal.slate,marginTop:"2px"}}>
                        {hasGoals?"Every subject is on track. Keep it up!":"Every subject has at least one entry."}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ):null}
                <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:"0.45rem"}}>
                  {cards.map(({s,logged,target,touched,onTrack,pct})=>(
                    <div key={s.id}
                      onClick={!onTrack?startLog:undefined}
                      style={{background:onTrack?"#fff":touched?"#fff":"#fff8e6",borderRadius:"11px",padding:"0.55rem 0.7rem",border:`1.5px solid ${onTrack?pal.good+"40":touched?pal.stone+"30":"#f5c842"}`,cursor:!onTrack?"pointer":"default",transition:"all 0.12s"}}>
                      <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"0.5rem",marginBottom:target!==null?"0.3rem":"0"}}>
                        <span style={{fontSize:"1rem",flexShrink:0}}>{s.icon}</span>
                        <span style={{flex:1,fontWeight:"700",color:onTrack?pal.good:touched?pal.inkM:"#7a5500",fontSize:"0.8rem"}}>{s.label}</span>
                        <span style={{fontSize:"0.74rem",fontWeight:"800",color:onTrack?pal.good:touched?pal.primary:"#b07800"}}>
                          {target!==null
                            ? logged+"/"+target+" lessons"
                            : touched?"✓ logged":"Not yet"}
                        </span>
                        {onTrack&&<span style={{fontSize:"0.75rem",color:pal.good}}>{"✓"}</span>}
                      </div>
                      {target!==null&&(
                        <div style={{height:"4px",borderRadius:"99px",background:pal.stone+"30",overflow:"hidden"}}>
                          <div style={{height:"100%",width:pct+"%",borderRadius:"99px",background:onTrack?pal.good:pct>50?pal.primary:"#f5c842",transition:"width 0.4s"}}/>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
                {!hasGoals&&(
                  <div style={{marginTop:"0.55rem",fontSize:"0.68rem",color:pal.slate,fontStyle:"italic",textAlign:"center"}}>
                    {"Set lesson goals in Settings to track progress here."}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </>
          );
        })()}

        {/* ── P&C This Week ── */}
        {family.lifeReady && (()=>{
          const ch    = family.children[0];
          const grade = ch?.grade||"5th";
          const topic = getLRTopicForWeek(grade);
          const week  = getLRWeekNumber(grade);
          return (<>
            <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"0.5rem"}}>
              <span style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pcDone?pal.good:LR_COLOR,fontSize:"0.82rem",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.06em"}}>
                {pcDone?"✓":LR_ICON} Prepared {"&"} Capable
              </span>
              <button onClick={()=>onTabChange("preparedcapable")} style={{fontSize:"0.72rem",color:LR_COLOR,fontWeight:"700",background:"transparent",border:"none",cursor:"pointer"}}>Open →</button>
            </div>
            {pcDone ? (
              /* Completed state */
              <div style={{background:pal.goodBg,borderRadius:"14px",padding:"0.85rem 1rem",marginBottom:"1rem",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.good}40`,display:"flex",gap:"0.75rem",alignItems:"center"}}>
                <div style={{width:"42px",height:"42px",borderRadius:"11px",background:pal.good,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"1.3rem",flexShrink:0}}>✓</div>
                <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                  <div style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.good,fontSize:"0.86rem"}}>Week {week} complete!</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:"0.68rem",color:pal.slate,marginTop:"2px",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{topic}</div>
                </div>
                <button onClick={()=>onTabChange("preparedcapable")} style={{padding:"0.3rem 0.65rem",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.good}50`,borderRadius:"9px",background:"transparent",color:pal.good,fontSize:"0.68rem",fontWeight:"700",cursor:"pointer",flexShrink:0}}>Review</button>
              </div>
            ) : (
              /* Active / not yet done state */
              <div style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${LR_COLOR}12,${LR_COLOR2}08)`,borderRadius:"14px",padding:"0.85rem 1rem",marginBottom:"1rem",border:`1.5px solid ${LR_COLOR}25`}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0.75rem",alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <div style={{width:"42px",height:"42px",borderRadius:"11px",background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${LR_COLOR},${LR_COLOR2})`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"1.3rem",flexShrink:0}}>{LR_ICON}</div>
                  <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:"0.65rem",fontWeight:"700",color:LR_COLOR,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.05em",marginBottom:"1px"}}>This Week · Week {week}</div>
                    <div style={{fontWeight:"700",color:pal.ink,fontSize:"0.86rem",lineHeight:1.3}}>{topic}</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:"0.67rem",color:pal.slate,marginTop:"2px"}}>{grade} · {ch?.name||"your student"}</div>
                  </div>
                  <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();markPCDone();}}
                    style={{padding:"0.38rem 0.65rem",border:"none",borderRadius:"10px",background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${LR_COLOR},${LR_COLOR2})`,color:"#fff",fontSize:"0.68rem",fontWeight:"800",cursor:"pointer",flexShrink:0,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
                    Done ✓
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </>);
        })()}

        {/* Recent portfolio entries */}
        {portfolioEntries.length > 0 && (<>
          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"0.5rem"}}>
            <span style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.82rem",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.06em"}}>Recent Work</span>
            <button onClick={()=>onTabChange("portfolio")} style={{fontSize:"0.72rem",color:pal.primary,fontWeight:"700",background:"transparent",border:"none",cursor:"pointer"}}>All →</button>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:"0.42rem",marginBottom:"1rem"}}>
            {portfolioEntries.slice(0,3).map((p,i)=>{
              const ch = family.children[p.childIdx];
              return (
                <div key={p.id} style={{background:pal.linen,borderRadius:"13px",padding:"0.65rem 0.85rem",display:"flex",gap:"0.75rem",alignItems:"center",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.stone}35`}}>
                  <div style={{width:"36px",height:"36px",borderRadius:"9px",background:pal.pale,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"1.2rem",flexShrink:0}}>{p.thumb||"📋"}</div>
                  <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                    <div style={{fontWeight:"700",color:pal.ink,fontSize:"0.82rem",whiteSpace:"nowrap",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis"}}>{p.title}</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:"0.68rem",color:pal.slate}}>{p.subj} · {p.date} {ch?"· "+ch.avatar+" "+ch.name:""}</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </>)}

        <div style={{height:"0.5rem"}}/>
      </div>
      {showQuickLog&&(()=>{
        const childIdx = Math.max(0,family.children.findIndex(c=>c.id===child));
        const currentChild = family.children[childIdx];
        const si = getStateInfo(family.state||"");
        return <DailyPortfolioModal pal={pal} family={family} childIdx={childIdx} stateInfo={si}
          onClose={()=>{ setShowQuickLog(false); setLogQueue([]); }}
          onSave={(entries)=>{
            entries.forEach(e=>onAddEntry&&onAddEntry(e));
            onCheckin&&onCheckin(currentChild?.id);
            if(logQueue.length>0){
              const [nextChildId,...rest] = logQueue;
              // Show transition screen instead of jumping directly
              setShowQuickLog(false);
              setNextChildPrompt({nextChildId, prevEntries:entries, queue:rest});
              setCarryOverSubjs([]); // reset carryover selection
            } else {
              setShowQuickLog(false);
            }
          }} prevCarryOver={carryOverSubjs.length>0?carryOverSubjs:null}/>;
      })()}

      {/* ── Next Child Transition Prompt ── */}
      {nextChildPrompt&&(()=>{
        const nextChild = family.children.find(c=>c.id===nextChildPrompt.nextChildId);
        if(!nextChild) return null;
        const nextCp = CHILD_COLOR_PALETTES.find(p=>p.id===(nextChild.colorId||"sunshine"))||CHILD_COLOR_PALETTES[0];
        // Subjects from prev child's entries (for carry-over)
        const prevSubjs = [...new Set(nextChildPrompt.prevEntries.filter(e=>!e.isDay).map(e=>e.subj))];
        const remaining = nextChildPrompt.queue.length;
        return (
          <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:300,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.55)",backdropFilter:"blur(10px)",display:"flex",alignItems:"flex-end",justifyContent:"center"}}>
            <div style={{width:"100%",maxWidth:"430px",background:pal.linen,borderRadius:"24px 24px 0 0",animation:"slideUp 0.28s ease",paddingBottom:"env(safe-area-inset-bottom)"}}>
              <div style={{padding:"0.65rem 0 0",display:"flex",justifyContent:"center"}}>
                <div style={{width:"36px",height:"4px",borderRadius:"99px",background:pal.stone+"60"}}/>
              </div>
              <div style={{padding:"1rem 1.2rem 0.5rem",textAlign:"center"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:"2.2rem",marginBottom:"0.3rem",animation:"grow 0.35s ease"}}>{"✅"}</div>
                <div style={{fontWeight:"800",color:pal.good,fontSize:"1rem",marginBottom:"0.15rem"}}>
                  {family.children.find(c=>c.id!==nextChildPrompt.nextChildId&&!nextChildPrompt.queue.includes(c.id))?.name||"Done"}{" logged!"}
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:"0.76rem",color:pal.slate}}>
                  {remaining>0
                    ? "Up next: "+nextChild.name+" · then "+(remaining)+" more"
                    : "Up next: "+nextChild.name+" (last one!)"}
                </div>
              </div>

              <div style={{padding:"0.75rem 1.2rem"}}>
                {/* Carry-over option */}
                {prevSubjs.length>0&&(
                  <div style={{background:pal.parchm,borderRadius:"13px",padding:"0.75rem 1rem",marginBottom:"0.85rem",border:`1.5px solid ${pal.stone}30`}}>
                    <div style={{fontWeight:"700",color:pal.inkM,fontSize:"0.78rem",marginBottom:"0.5rem"}}>
                      {"📋 Carry subjects over to "+nextChild.name+"?"}
                    </div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:"0.7rem",color:pal.slate,marginBottom:"0.6rem"}}>
                      {"Select any subjects to pre-fill — you can still edit notes"}
                    </div>
                    <div style={{display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:"0.3rem"}}>
                      {prevSubjs.map(s=>{
                        const sel = carryOverSubjs.includes(s);
                        return (
                          <button key={s} onClick={()=>setCarryOverSubjs(prev=>sel?prev.filter(x=>x!==s):[...prev,s])}
                            style={{padding:"0.28rem 0.65rem",borderRadius:"20px",border:`2px solid ${sel?nextCp.c1:pal.stone+"50"}`,background:sel?nextCp.c1+"18":"transparent",color:sel?nextCp.c1:pal.inkM,fontWeight:sel?"700":"400",fontSize:"0.76rem",cursor:"pointer",transition:"all 0.12s"}}>
                            {s}
                          </button>
                        );
                      })}
                    </div>
                    {prevSubjs.length>1&&(
